programme.title: E8 - Zagreb
programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E10 - Panic Mode
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: E6 - Drill vs. Super Metal
programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry’s water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA’s super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: E1 - Delhi
programme.desc: New Delhi is home to breathtaking architecture, great food and the world's highest rate of traffic accidents!

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: After their enjoyable outing, the Dokbakz return to their accommodation, ready to enjoy the real fun of Singapore. “Let's enjoy the moment, more important than platinum or gold!”

programme.title: E1 - Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: E72 - Dallas: Beechmont
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey buy a bug infested zombie with high hopes of turning it around. But when they encounter plumbing problems and an actual burglary, will their high hopes of a profitable flip be smashed?

programme.title: Big Lies In A Small Town
programme.desc: Rachel searches for her daughter after their car crashed outside of a town. She gets closer to finding out that the town doctor kidnapped her. He and his wife never got over the loss of their daughter.

programme.title: E92
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E4 - Blending The Old With The New
programme.desc: The Monastery of the Augustinian Sisters has been redesigned as a hotel complex focusing on harmony between the old and the new. At the Verdun Auditorium, the new arena perfectly sits side by side with the 1938 Art Deco wing and the beautiful EcoRad radiators.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E14 - Vincent Labergere, Emilie Dudon, Michel Dudon
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: E14 - New Contemporary Construction Near Jamioulx
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Jamioulx to discover a new construction: a contemporary home with a sleek facade. Also: The Ostendian Hotel in Ostend; the reconstruction of a ruined medieval castle in Inverness; making a coffee table with storage for poufs.

programme.title: E2 - Effects Of Climate Change And Hydrology
programme.desc: The North which is warming brings its share of extreme climate events, in particular water rising, for the inhabitants of Yukon. How can human ingenuity, mutual aid and Indigenous wisdom help us confront the inevitable?

programme.title: E92
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E15 - Renovation Of An Old Watermill
programme.desc: Off to Hoeilaart to discover the renovation of a charming small red brick house that used to be a 1662 watermill! Also: the Mont-des-Pins Treelodges in Durbuy; cellulose wadding insulation; making storage with an integrated plant.

programme.desc: Chef Louise Denisot prepares soba noodles with roasted butternut squash cream.

programme.title: From Fruit Bats To Humans - A Virus On The Move
programme.desc: An infection with Nipah virus can quickly turn deadly. It's carried by fruit bats able to travel long distances. This time around we look at how organisms spread through migration, and how climate change affects the process.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E3 - Collar Complications
programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.title: E2 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E2 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life

programme.title: E2 - Singapore Serial Swindler
programme.desc: We uncover how Singapore's own 'Tinder Swindler' got away with his bold schemes for 4 years. Hear from victims, police, lawyers and even the conman himself.

programme.title: E3 - The Eagle Totem
programme.desc: In the province of Bayin Olgii, in the far west of Mongolia, Kazakh nomads capture and train golden eagles to hunt foxes and wolves.

programme.title: E4 - Kelantan
programme.desc: In Kelantan, there is a minority group of Peranakan Chinese. They are distinctly different from the Baba Nyonya in their origins, language, culture, and lifestyle.

programme.title: E5 - Lashio
programme.desc: Lashio, Myanmar is steeped in Chinese culture.These locals with Chinese origins speak and read Chinese and celebrate traditional Chinese festivals.

programme.title: Kuwaha Maori And The Floating Worlds Time Forgot
programme.desc: The installation of an ornate carving from Aotearoa (NZ) at Singapore's renowned Gardens by the Bay opens a cultural conversation.

programme.title: E4 - Li Chen
programme.desc: Taking cues from Chinese religion and philosophy, Li Chen create a rich body of work in a uniquely Chinese vocabulary that appeals to a wider audience.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Tasked with swaying Azai retainer Miyabe Keijun (Donpei), Tokichiro is confronted with an impossible demand: a child to be taken hostage. Childless himself, he attempts to offer the child of Tomo (Miyazawa Emma), only to provoke her fury and be forced to turn to Koichiro instead. Meanwhile, the defeated Azai Nagamasa and Asakura Yoshikage (Tsurumi Shingo) seek refuge at Enryakuji Temple, leading Oda Nobunaga to order the temple's destruction if it refused to submit.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E3 - 首次盲選約會 飛速升溫
programme.desc: 30+的素人嘉賓們帶著成熟與期待，在摩登都市上海入住郊區小屋，從陌生到熟悉，從心動到堅定，共同開啟一段30天的尋愛之旅；除了元老嘉賓謝楠、張純燁、唐藝昕之外，更邀請了徐藝洋和顏安等組成「半熟觀察員」，一同見證高甜瞬間。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明被「貼心小棉襖」感動落淚
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E12 - 收官之夜 終極盛典
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明被「貼心小棉襖」感動落淚
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E7 - 娘娘團集體回憶當年拍戲幕後
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E7 - 娘娘團集體回憶當年拍戲幕後
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Dreaming
programme.desc: Jessi shares a strange dream, and Naomi uses her dream app to decode it. Soon, everyone's sharing wild dreams-except Robbie, who admits he only has nightmares. With Motor's “In Dreams” machine, the gang dives in to help Robbie experience his first real dream ever.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: When Darwin brings home a mirror, Kea sees her reflection and falls in love with her new friend.

programme.title: Forget Yourself
programme.desc: Teresa builds an army of Kemii-bees to use against the humans, but gets electrocuted and loses her memory and identity, just as the evil, powerful robot bees go on a rampage against humans and aliens alike.

programme.title: Andrea M: Hula Hoop Artist
programme.desc: Alan Pixsley meets hula hooping legend Andrea M, a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder for most spins around the body's backside in a minute. Andrea showcases her talent and shares her journey to mastery. What is the one thing Alan takes away from his encounter with Andrea?

programme.title: 3, 2, 1...Lift-off!
programme.desc: The chemical reaction that takes place in the engines of a real rocket produces a large amount of very hot gas that makes the rocket lift off into the sky. Eric mixes baking powder and water to create a chemical reaction strong enough to launch a toy rocket.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: When Darwin brings home a mirror, Kea sees her reflection and falls in love with her new friend.

programme.title: Towel
programme.desc: Why throw the old towels away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite thing to do

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Trip to Vietnam
programme.desc: Zoe has made some delicious cupcakes and invites Milo and Alim to try them out. Zoe is surprised to see the hamster eating on the floor instead of on the table. Well, in Vietnam, eating on the floor is not something unusual.

programme.title: Trip to Louisiana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have formed a band. They want Alim to be part of it, but the hamster insists on using empty cans as drums. For Zoe and Milo, that is not a proper instrument. Alim knows it's possible to play music with all sorts of things. It's time for a trip to Louisiana.

programme.title: Monkey - Lifted
programme.desc: A fruit seed takes root and grows magically while the monkey sleeps; caught on top of the growing plant, the monkey wakes up to the sight of bananas; but getting to these bananas is not easy for a monkey as small as an insect.

programme.title: Fruit Pudding
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula prepare delicious fruit pudding to teach everyone how important it is to eat a lot of fruit.

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: A.I.M.Y
programme.desc: A new artificial intelligence program running the submarine stops the Nektons from saving a kayaker. Can Ant outwit it and save the day?

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Mannequin
programme.desc: Henry meets a mannequin in a shop window. Mannequin loves living in the shop window but he has always dreamed of becoming a super model.

programme.title: Chukwuebuka and Chinonso (Kid Eche): Renowned Freestyle Footballer
programme.desc: Chinonso Eche and his coach, Chukwuebuka Ezugha, are both football freestylers who hold many GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS titles. They meet Alan Pixsley and teach him the basics of football freestyle.

programme.title: Leaving Your Comfort Zone
programme.desc: The artistic seniors are back from the World Championships and have qualified for the next Olympic Games, so it's time for the coaches to start thinking about who will make up the Olympic team. Amelie and Phoebe have been invited to an elite training camp in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Devil's Sea Mystery
programme.desc: Are aliens stealing things from a Japanese island and dragging them underwater? The Nektons investigate and find something dangerous!

programme.title: Life-saving Blood Donations
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand do an experiment to show how eating different types of food affected their poo. Dr. Xand donates blood and finds out how it is processed. There are patients with a cut hand and a cut eyebrow in the emergency room.

programme.title: Broken
programme.desc: It's not good news for Chase, who heads to the hospital after suffering an injury at the gym and has a nervous wait to find out how long he'll be out of action. And Acro duo Dylan and Lola join the Acro squad for their first big international competition in Portugal.

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: Trip to Vietnam
programme.desc: Zoe has made some delicious cupcakes and invites Milo and Alim to try them out. Zoe is surprised to see the hamster eating on the floor instead of on the table. Well, in Vietnam, eating on the floor is not something unusual.

programme.title: Trip to Louisiana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have formed a band. They want Alim to be part of it, but the hamster insists on using empty cans as drums. For Zoe and Milo, that is not a proper instrument. Alim knows it's possible to play music with all sorts of things. It's time for a trip to Louisiana.

programme.desc: Sameera's boyfriend disappoints her on her birthday and she ends up sleeping with Vivek. Vivek hacks into everything and makes her life miserable. Release Year: 2020 Director: Vikram Bhatt

programme.desc: When an elite team of firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings, they quickly realise that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet – babysitting.

programme.desc: When a kid is bummed that his favorite shirt won't fit over his big belly, it's up to Uncle Grandpa to show him that t-shirts come and go, but having a big belly is always cool.

programme.title: E2 - Funny Face
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa accidentally unleashes a floating Funny Face that's so funny you will laugh yourself to insanity! Can Gus' seriousness save them from the hilarity?

programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year, meaning it's time for the annual multi-day animal holiday, ANIMAS.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E6 - When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns about all the things he can be when he grows up! His adventure starts with a school trip to the fire station, where the kids learn what to do in an emergency & how firefighters are true superheroes! Then, he learns about all the different community helpers, like police officers & doctors. The learning continues as he discovers all about traffic lights & road safety while playing with his new toy car.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Lavender
programme.desc: Athena is an aromatherapy tutor but can't heal up her wound at heart. One day, she finds a broken-wing angel falling on balcony. A scented romance is gradually in between them...

programme.title: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Ren takes out his entire savings and persuades his best friend Sing to leave for Vegas with him. They challenge the most well respected dealer in town, and in just one round, Ren's wages is all wiped out. Ren and Sing begin their trip back to LA, but on the way their car mysteriously overturns and crashes, Sing is dead. Ren arrives home wearily to find a message on his answering machine that warns him not to go to Vegas. He decides to go back to Vegas to find out what really happened that killed Sing...

programme.title: Prison On Fire II
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays a veteran inmate Chung Tin Ching. When serving his term, Ching's mother passed away his son is sent to an orphanage. When his application for leave is turned down, he breaks out of prison, further antagonizing the new Head of Security, played by Tsui Kam Kong. Chen Sung Yung plays a fellow inmate from the Mainland, Lung who befriends Ching. When he is framed for murder, Ching is implicated in fingering him. Ching and Lung must break out of prison to stay alive...

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Wah is an unkempt, uneducated and undiplomatic guy who is doomed to be a loser of love. Bok Ping is a stylish Shanghai girl with a tycoon father. But Bok Ping decides to go to Hong Kong to seek her mother, who has departed from her when she was a child. She encounters Wah in the process and lives a simple life with Wah's mother. Wah, being influenced by Bok Ping, becomes more polite and cultured. Meanwhile, Bok Ping's father deems that Wah has kidnapped his daughter, but unexpectedly, Bok Ping has really been kidnapped...

programme.title: Fly Me To Polaris
programme.desc: What if you are given a wish being the 60th billion person moving to 'Polaris' (or others call it 'Heaven'), will you do the same as Onion, who was blind and dumb when he's alive?

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Life Hotel
programme.desc: To raise funds for his father, Sanqing, who has faced social ostracism, goes undercover at the Life Hotel near the hospital, aiming to disrupt its operations and coerce owner Xiao Lin into agreeing to its demolition. However, as they spend time together, Sanqing forms bonds with the hotel's residents and learns of the guests' life stories. His internal conflict escalates, turning a simple undercover assignment into a matter of personal integrity. The hotel's destiny impacts not only its inhabitants but also Sanqing's longing for home. Yet, his indecision triggers a deeper crisis...

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin's win rate as a coach is less than 10%! Dismissed, expelled, bankrupt, kicked out, divorced...Even in life, he's experiencing defeat after defeat. Then, Pink Storm, a pro volleyball team that is on the brink of disbanding, brings him on as their coach. Pink Storm's ace players have all transferred to another team, so it's currently a team of leftovers. Jung-won buys the team even though the players have no skills and no teamwork. Jung-won, who is obsessed with creating a heartwarming story of losers' growing pains, pledges to give away a total of $2 million if Pink Storm wins just once. Pink Storm becomes the center of attention, but they keep losing. Woo-jin is used to losing, but he still gets frustrated. Even though the players lack experience and potential, he starts to desire one win...

programme.title: HK Stylized Thriller: Mad Fate
programme.desc: On a rainy evening, a fortune telling master tries to help a prostitute avert certain death, but fate has plans of its own. He arrives at the prostitute's home just a few minutes too late, watching her take her last breath while Siu Tung stares at her corpse with creepy fascination. When he foretells that Siu Tung will soon commit murder, the Master believes that he has the power to change the inevitable. On the contrary, the veteran detective who once sent Siu Tung to jail for brutally killing a cat believes that Siu Tong is a born psychopath whose bloodthirst cannot be stopped. While Siu Tung becomes increasingly overwhelmed by his insatiable desire for murder, the Master puts his sanity on the line to change the course of fate. But is it possible to defeat the all-powerful force that paves life's path?

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Bioscopewala
programme.desc: A woman meets her dead father's old friend, who was the operator of a Bioscope show that she loved in her childhood. Connecting India and Afghanistan, a story of love and cinema unfolds. Release Year: 2017 Director: Deb Medhekar Awards: 2018 Nominee FOI Online Award - Best Screenplay Adapted - Deb Medhekar, Radhika Anand
